extra.message: User input from the 'username' query parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string passed to Environment.from_string(). This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI), enabling an attacker to execute arbitrary Python code by injecting Jinja2 template syntax (e.g., '{{ ''.__class__.__mro__[2].__subclasses__() }}'). The vulnerability occurs because user-controlled input is interpolated into the template before compilation, allowing template engine code injection.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
